channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [RODIUM] Rodium Realty Ltd: Promoters Confirm No Encumbrance of Shares in FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Rodium Realty Ltd. has disclosed that the promoters, promoter group, and persons acting in concert (PAC) have not made any encumbrance directly or indirectly in the equity shares of the company as of March 31, 2026. This declaration has been made in accordance with Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Rodium Realty Ltd. promoters confirm no encumbrance of shares as of March 31, 2026.
  • The confirmation is in accordance with Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • The declaration includes Rodium Realty Limited's promoter group and persons acting in concert (PAC).
  • No encumbrance has been made directly or indirectly in the company's equity shares during the financial year ended on March 31, 2026.
  • The information is provided for the financial year 2025-2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rodium Realty Limited | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ORACLECR] Credent Global Finance Ltd Opens New Branch in Uttar Pradesh
item.description:
Credent Global Finance Limited has announced the opening of a new branch office in Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, as of April 01st, 2026. The new branch is located at Branch Address Ghaziabad Shop no. SB-14A, SB-14B, SB-15A & SB-15B (LGF) Block, Jaipuria Sunrise Plaza 12A Ahinsa Khand Indirapuram Ghaziabad.

  • Credent Global Finance Ltd has opened a new branch office in Uttar Pradesh.
  • The new branch is located in Ghaziabad.
  • The branch office became operational on April 01st, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Oracle Credit Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SBLI] Promoters of SBL Infratech Ltd Confirm No Encumbrance on Shares for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
In accordance with Regulation 31(4) of SAST Regulations 2011, Kinjal Alpeshbhai Solanki, on behalf of themselves and other promoters of SBL Infratech Limited (ISIN: INEODLM01024), have confirmed that no encumbrance, directly or indirectly, was made on the shares held by the promoters in SBL Infratech Limited during the Financial Year ended March 31, 2026. This disclosure includes Shifali Sharma, as shown in Table-1.

  • Kinjal Alpeshbhai Solanki and other promoters of SBL Infratech Limited confirm no encumbrance on shares for FY 2025-2026
  • Regulation 31(4) of SAST Regulations 2011 complied with
  • Disclosure includes promoters named in Table-1, such as Shifali Sharma
  • Shares held in SBL Infratech Limited were not encumbered during the financial year ended March 31, 2026
  • SBL Infratech Limited's ISIN number is INEODLM01024

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SBL Infratech Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [MASTERTR] Master Trust Ltd Promoter Harjeet Singh Arora Discloses 2.03% Share Pledge for Loan to Subsidiary
item.description:
Master Trust Ltd promoter Harjeet Singh Arora has disclosed the creation of a pledge on 2.03% of his shares in the company. The pledge is on behalf of ICICI Bank Limited, acting as a collateral for a loan availed by the company's wholly owned subsidiary, Master Capital Services Limited. This disclosure was made under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Master Trust Ltd promoter Harjeet Singh Arora pledges 2.03% shares for subsidiary's loan
  • ICICI Bank Limited holds the pledge as collateral for the loan
  • Loan availed by Master Trust Limited's subsidiary, Master Capital Services Limited
  • Disclosure made under SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MASTER TRUST LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [AARTIPHARM] Promoter Mirik Rajendra Gogri Creates Pledge in Favor of Bajaj Financial Securities and 360 One Distribution Services
item.description:
According to a disclosure made under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Mirik Rajendra Gogri has created a pledge in favor of Bajaj Financial Securities Limited and 360 One Distribution Services Limited. The pledge involves 27,84,094 shares of Aarti Pharmalabs Limited, which is 3.08% of the total share capital.

  • Mirik Rajendra Gogri, a promoter of Aarti Pharmalabs Ltd, has created a pledge in favor of Bajaj Financial Securities Limited and 360 One Distribution Services Limited.
  • The pledge involves 27,84,094 shares of Aarti Pharmalabs Limited, which is 3.08% of the total share capital.
  • The pledge was created on 25th March 2026.
  • Bajaj Financial Securities Limited and 360 One Distribution Services Limited are the entities in whose favor the shares have been encumbered.
  • The purpose of the encumbrance is not explicitly stated in the document.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aarti Pharmalabs Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [AARTIPHARM] Promoter Renil Rajendra Gogri Creates Pledge in Favor of Aditya Birla Money Limited, Bajaj Financial Securities Limited and 360 One Distribution Services Limited
item.description:
Renil Rajendra Gogri, a promoter of Aarti Pharmalabs Ltd, has created a pledge in favor of Aditya Birla Money Limited, Bajaj Financial Securities Limited and 360 One Distribution Services Limited. The pledge is for a total of 15,19,919 shares, which is 3.89% of the total share capital of the company. This disclosure was made under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Renil Rajendra Gogri creates pledge in favor of Aditya Birla Money Limited, Bajaj Financial Securities Limited and 360 One Distribution Services Limited
  • 15,19,919 shares pledged, which is 3.89% of the total share capital
  • Pledge created under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aarti Pharmalabs Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [AARTIPHARM] Promoter of Aarti Pharmalabs Ltd Creates Pledge of 15,19,919 Shares in Favor of Aditya Birla Money Limited, Bajaj Financial Securities Limited and 360 One Distribution Services Limited
item.description:
On March 31, 2026, Mr. Renil Rajendra Gogri, promoter of Aarti Pharmalabs Ltd, disclosed the creation of a pledge of 15,19,919 shares in favor of Aditya Birla Money Limited, Bajaj Financial Securities Limited and 360 One Distribution Services Limited. This encumbrance represents 3.89% of the total share capital of the company. The purpose of the encumbrance is not specified in the disclosure.

  • Creation of pledge by promoter of Aarti Pharmalabs Ltd in favor of Aditya Birla Money Limited, Bajaj Financial Securities Limited and 360 One Distribution Services Limited
  • 15,19,919 shares encumbered, representing 3.89% of the total share capital
  • Disclosure made under Regulation 31(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aarti Pharmalabs Ltd | Category: Pledge

item.title: [AARTIPHARM] Promoter of Aarti Pharmalabs Ltd Creates Pledge of 2.89% Shares in Favor of Bajaj Financial Securities Limited and 360 One Distribution Services Limited
item.description:
The promoter of Aarti Pharmalabs Ltd, Mr. Mirik Rajendra Gogri, has created a pledge of 2,616,700 shares (2.89% of total share capital) in favor of Bajaj Financial Securities Limited and 360 One Distribution Services Limited. This encumbrance was created on 25th March 2026. The purpose of the encumbrance is not specified in the document.

  • Promoter of Aarti Pharmalabs Ltd creates pledge of shares
  • 2.89% shares encumbered in favor of Bajaj Financial Securities Limited and 360 One Distribution Services Limited
  • Encumbrance created on 25th March 2026
  • Pledge of 2,616,700 shares by promoter Mr. Mirik Rajendra Gogri

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aarti Pharmalabs Ltd | Category: Pledge

item.title: [MAHSEAMLES] Maharashtra Seamless Ltd Receives Moderate ESG Rating of 56 from NSE Sustainability
item.description:
Maharashtra Seamless Ltd has been assigned an Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) score of '56' with a rating category of 'Moderate' by NSE Sustainability Ratings and Analytics Limited. The rating is based on publicly available data, and the company did not engage NSE Sustainability for this rating. The report has been prepared independently using information from the public domain. This disclosure is made as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD POD2/I/3762/2026 dated 30th January, 2026.

  • Maharashtra Seamless Ltd receives ESG score of 56 from NSE Sustainability
  • Rating category is 'Moderate'
  • Rating is based on publicly available data
  • Company did not engage NSE Sustainability for the rating
  • Disclosure made as per SEBI regulations and master circular

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAHARASHTRA SEAMLESS LTD. | Category: Transmission of Shares

item.title: [TRITONV] Triton Valves Ltd Secures 7-Year Contract from German Tech Firm Aumovio, Boosting Profitability and Cash Flow
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Triton Valves Ltd has signed a 7-year contract with Aumovio Germany GmbH, a German-based independent automotive technology company, for the supply of TPMS Valves. The contract, which is set to begin in the third quarter of the 2027-28 financial year, has the potential to significantly improve the company's profitability and cash flow. The contract also highlights the company's technical and commercial strength, as its product meets the standards of an international customer.

  • 7-year contract with Aumovio Germany GmbH
  • Potential sales during the contract period detailed in Annexure-A
  • Improvement in company's profitability and cash flow
  • Product meets the standards of an international customer
  • Highlights technical and commercial strength of the company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TRITON VALVES LTD. | Category: Deals
